10  */

23 class LinearInterpGridDataFunctionService
24  : public ArcaneLinearInterpGridDataFunctionObject
25  , public UnsteadyRegularGridDataT<LinearInterpGridDataInterpolator>
26 {
27 public:
28 
30  LinearInterpGridDataFunctionService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
31  : ArcaneLinearInterpGridDataFunctionObject(sbi)
32  , UnsteadyRegularGridDataT<LinearInterpGridDataInterpolator>(traceMng(), subDomain()->ioMng()) {}
33 
35  ~LinearInterpGridDataFunctionService() {}
36 
37 public:
38 
40  void init();
41 
42 };
43 
44 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
45 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
46 
47 void
48 LinearInterpGridDataFunctionService::
49 init()
50 {
51  // Set grid type from option
52  setRegularGridType(options()->gridType());
53 
54  // Read Regular Grid Data
55  setPoints(options()->filename());
56 
57  // Initialize object
58  UnsteadyRegularGridDataT<LinearInterpGridDataInterpolator>::init();
59 }
60

67 using namespace Arcane;
68 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_LINEARINTERPGRIDDATAFUNCTION(LinearInterpGridDataFunction,LinearInterpGridDataFunctionService);
